rationale: Primary entity name at top of the Statement of Dissociation.

label_verbatim: FIRST: The general partner named herein is dissociated... (Name of General Partner)
rationale: Name of the GP being dissociated, named in the FIRST recital. Non-indexed because the form provides exactly one slot. Mirrors the indexed `dissociated_general_partner_N.name` family used on MLPA-9 (Certificate of Amendment), where multi-slot dissociations are listed.
Date the Statement was signed by the dissociating GP.

Printed name of the individual GP signer. Per-officer signer pattern (see schema-gaps/2026-04-30-per-officer-signer-pattern.md). Per the page-1 footnote, this person MUST be the dissociating GP — i.e., this value equals `dissociated_general_partner.name` when that partner is an individual.

label_verbatim: For General Partner(s) which are Entities / Name of Entity
rationale: Name of the entity GP, used when the dissociating GP is an entity rather than a natural person. Per the footnote, equals `dissociated_general_partner.name` in that case.

label_verbatim: By ____ (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Printed name and capacity of the natural person signing on behalf of the entity GP. Combined-shape primitive (Shape D) applied per officer.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1; universal handle for entity name on this filing.

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2; supports multi-form bundling.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite tier enum value 'hold_for_pickup'.
Expedite tier enum value '24h_next_business_day' (+$50).
Expedite tier enum value 'immediate_same_day' (+$100).
Total filing fees enclosed; base $35 plus any expedite premium.
Contact person for the filing.
Contact phone number.

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
rationale: Contact email for this specific filing.

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)
rationale: Email for annual report reminders (entity-level, not filing-level).
Recipient name for attested copy of the completed filing.
Recipient firm/company.
Recipient mailing address street.
Recipient city, state, and zip combined.
